message:
feat(ci): add proof CI pipeline and artifact export (bd-2rhiq)

- Enhanced scripts/run_proof_checks.sh with structured JSON manifest,
  categorized checks, per-check log files, and optional TLA+/Lean steps
- Added CI steps: lease semantics, close quiescence, refinement
  conformance, TLA+ bounded model check, manifest validation
- Extended proof artifact collection with lease/quiescence/refinement
  JSON test reports and TLA+ model check results
- Created tests/proof_artifact_manifest.rs with 7 tests validating
  manifest schema, arithmetic consistency, status values, and semver

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -327,6 +327,22 @@ jobs:
       - name: Trace canonicalization tests
         run: cargo test --lib trace::canonicalize --all-features -- --nocapture
 
+      - name: Lease semantics and liveness tests (bd-yj06g)
+        run: cargo test --test lease_semantics -- --nocapture
+
+      - name: Close quiescence regression tests (bd-sbi6e)
+        run: cargo test --test close_quiescence_regression -- --nocapture
+
+      - name: Refinement conformance tests (bd-3g13z)
+        run: cargo test --test refinement_conformance -- --nocapture
+
+      - name: Proof artifact manifest validation
+        run: cargo test --test proof_artifact_manifest -- --nocapture
+
+      - name: TLA+ bounded model check (bd-11g3i)
+        run: bash scripts/run_model_check.sh --ci
+        continue-on-error: true
+
       - name: Generate proof artifacts report
         if: always()
         run: |
@@ -335,6 +351,11 @@ jobs:
           cargo test --lib plan::certificate --all-features -- --format json 2>&1 | tee proof-artifacts/certificate-tests.json || true
           cargo test --lib obligation --all-features -- --format json 2>&1 | tee proof-artifacts/obligation-tests.json || true
           cargo test --lib lab::oracle --all-features -- --format json 2>&1 | tee proof-artifacts/oracle-tests.json || true
+          cargo test --test lease_semantics -- --format json 2>&1 | tee proof-artifacts/lease-semantics.json || true
+          cargo test --test close_quiescence_regression -- --format json 2>&1 | tee proof-artifacts/close-quiescence.json || true
+          cargo test --test refinement_conformance -- --format json 2>&1 | tee proof-artifacts/refinement-conformance.json || true
+          # Copy TLA+ results if available
+          cp formal/tla/output/result.json proof-artifacts/tla-model-check.json 2>/dev/null || true
 
       - name: Upload proof artifacts
         if: always()

@@ -1,55 +1,201 @@
 #!/usr/bin/env bash
-# Run formal proof verification checks locally.
-# Mirrors the proof-checks CI job in .github/workflows/ci.yml
+# Run formal proof verification checks locally (bd-2rhiq).
+# Mirrors and extends the proof-checks CI job in .github/workflows/ci.yml.
+#
+# Usage:
+#   scripts/run_proof_checks.sh [--json] [--artifacts-dir DIR]
+#
+# Options:
+#   --json           Emit structured JSON manifest to stdout (plus artifacts dir)
+#   --artifacts-dir  Directory for proof artifacts (default: target/proof-artifacts)
 #
-# Usage: ./scripts/run_proof_checks.sh
 # Exit 0 = all checks passed, non-zero = at least one failed.
+#
+# Cross-references:
+#   CI workflow: .github/workflows/ci.yml (proof-checks job)
+#   TLA+ model: formal/tla/Asupersync.tla
+#   Lean spec:  formal/lean/Asupersync.lean
+#   Lease tests: tests/lease_semantics.rs
 
 set -euo pipefail
 
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+PROJECT_DIR="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd)"
+cd "$PROJECT_DIR"
+
+# Parse args
+JSON_MODE=false
+ARTIFACTS_DIR="target/proof-artifacts"
+while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
+    case "$1" in
+        --json) JSON_MODE=true; shift ;;
+        --artifacts-dir) ARTIFACTS_DIR="$2"; shift 2 ;;
+        *) echo "Unknown option: $1"; exit 1 ;;
+    esac
+done
+
+mkdir -p "$ARTIFACTS_DIR"
+
 FAILED=0
+TOTAL=0
+PASSED=0
+RESULTS=()
+START_TS=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
 
 run_check() {
     local name="$1"
-    shift
-    echo "=== $name ==="
-    if "$@"; then
+    local category="$2"
+    shift 2
+    TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
+
+    local logfile="$ARTIFACTS_DIR/$(echo "$name" | tr ' ' '_' | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]').log"
+    local status="pass"
+    local start_s=$SECONDS
+
+    echo "=== [$TOTAL] $name ==="
+    if "$@" > "$logfile" 2>&1; then
+        echo "  PASS"
+        PASSED=$((PASSED + 1))
+    else
+        echo "  FAIL (see $logfile)"
+        status="fail"
+        FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
+        # Show last 10 lines for diagnostics
+        tail -10 "$logfile" | sed 's/^/  | /'
+    fi
+    local elapsed=$((SECONDS - start_s))
+    echo "  (${elapsed}s)"
+    echo
+
+    RESULTS+=("{\"name\":\"$name\",\"category\":\"$category\",\"status\":\"$status\",\"elapsed_s\":$elapsed,\"log\":\"$(basename "$logfile")\"}")
+}
+
+run_check_optional() {
+    local name="$1"
+    local category="$2"
+    shift 2
+    TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
+
+    local logfile="$ARTIFACTS_DIR/$(echo "$name" | tr ' ' '_' | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]').log"
+    local status="skip"
+    local start_s=$SECONDS
+
+    echo "=== [$TOTAL] $name (optional) ==="
+    if "$@" > "$logfile" 2>&1; then
         echo "  PASS"
+        status="pass"
+        PASSED=$((PASSED + 1))
     else
-        echo "  FAIL"
-        FAILED=1
+        echo "  SKIPPED or FAIL (non-blocking)"
+        # Don't increment FAILED — optional checks don't block
     fi
+    local elapsed=$((SECONDS - start_s))
+    echo "  (${elapsed}s)"
     echo
+
+    RESULTS+=("{\"name\":\"$name\",\"category\":\"$category\",\"status\":\"$status\",\"elapsed_s\":$elapsed,\"log\":\"$(basename "$logfile")\"}")
 }
 
-run_check "Certificate verification" \
+echo "=== Asupersync Proof Verification Suite (bd-2rhiq) ==="
+echo "Artifacts: $ARTIFACTS_DIR"
+echo ""
+
+# ---- Category: Rust Proof Tests ----
+
+run_check "Certificate verification" "rust-proofs" \
     cargo test --lib plan::certificate --all-features -- --nocapture
 
-run_check "Obligation formal checks" \
+run_check "Obligation formal checks" "rust-proofs" \
     cargo test --lib obligation --all-features -- --nocapture
 
-run_check "Lab oracle invariant checks" \
+run_check "Lab oracle invariant checks" "rust-proofs" \
     cargo test --lib lab::oracle --all-features -- --nocapture
 
-run_check "Cancellation protocol tests" \
+run_check "Cancellation protocol tests" "rust-proofs" \
     cargo test --lib types::cancel --all-features -- --nocapture
 
-run_check "Combinator algebraic laws" \
+run_check "Combinator algebraic laws" "rust-proofs" \
     cargo test --lib combinator::laws --all-features -- --nocapture
 
-run_check "TLA+ export smoke test" \
+run_check "TLA+ export smoke test" "rust-proofs" \
     cargo test --lib trace::tla_export --all-features -- --nocapture
 
-run_check "Trace canonicalization" \
+run_check "Trace canonicalization" "rust-proofs" \
     cargo test --lib trace::canonicalize --all-features -- --nocapture
 
-run_check "DPOR exploration" \
-    cargo test --test dpor_exploration --all-features -- --nocapture || true
+# ---- Category: Integration Proof Tests ----
+
+run_check "Lease semantics and liveness" "integration-proofs" \
+    cargo test --test lease_semantics -- --nocapture
+
+run_check "Close quiescence regression" "integration-proofs" \
+    cargo test --test close_quiescence_regression -- --nocapture
+
+run_check "Refinement conformance" "integration-proofs" \
+    cargo test --test refinement_conformance -- --nocapture
+
+# ---- Category: DPOR (optional, may not be present) ----
 
-if [ "$FAILED" -eq 0 ]; then
-    echo "All proof checks passed."
+run_check_optional "DPOR exploration" "dpor" \
+    cargo test --test dpor_exploration --all-features -- --nocapture
+
+# ---- Category: TLA+ Model Checking (optional, requires TLC) ----
+
+run_check_optional "TLA+ bounded model check" "tla-model" \
+    bash scripts/run_model_check.sh --ci
+
+# ---- Category: Lean Proof Build (optional, requires lake) ----
+
+if command -v lake &>/dev/null; then
+    run_check "Lean proof build" "lean-proofs" \
+        bash -c "cd formal/lean && lake build"
 else
-    echo "Some proof checks FAILED."
+    echo "=== [skip] Lean proof build (lake not installed) ==="
+    echo "  Install elan/lean4 to enable: curl -sSf https://raw.githubusercontent.com/leanprover/elan/master/elan-init.sh | sh"
+    echo
+    RESULTS+=("{\"name\":\"Lean proof build\",\"category\":\"lean-proofs\",\"status\":\"skip\",\"elapsed_s\":0,\"log\":\"\"}")
+fi
+
+# ---- Generate manifest ----
+
+END_TS=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
+GIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
+GIT_BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
+
+# Build JSON array from results
+RESULTS_JSON="["
+for i in "${!RESULTS[@]}"; do
+    if [ "$i" -gt 0 ]; then RESULTS_JSON+=","; fi
+    RESULTS_JSON+="${RESULTS[$i]}"
+done
+RESULTS_JSON+="]"
+
+MANIFEST=$(cat <<ENDJSON
+{
+    "version": "1.0.0",
+    "bead": "bd-2rhiq",
+    "started_at": "$START_TS",
+    "finished_at": "$END_TS",
+    "git_sha": "$GIT_SHA",
+    "git_branch": "$GIT_BRANCH",
+    "total": $TOTAL,
+    "passed": $PASSED,
+    "failed": $FAILED,
+    "skipped": $((TOTAL - PASSED - FAILED)),
+    "status": "$([ "$FAILED" -eq 0 ] && echo "pass" || echo "fail")",
+    "checks": $RESULTS_JSON
+}
+ENDJSON
+)
+
+echo "$MANIFEST" > "$ARTIFACTS_DIR/manifest.json"
+
+echo "========================================"
+echo "Results: $PASSED/$TOTAL passed, $FAILED failed"
+echo "Manifest: $ARTIFACTS_DIR/manifest.json"
+
+if $JSON_MODE; then
+    echo "$MANIFEST"
 fi
 
-exit $FAILED
+exit "$FAILED"
